Class AAABehaviour

java.lang.Object
game.AAABehaviour
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBehaviour
Direct Known Subclasses:
AAtack, AEnemy, BlockBehaviour, GameCompleteBehaviour, GameOverBehaviour, HUDDashBehaviour, HUDHealthBehaviour, HUDScoreBehaviour, PlayerBehaviour, StaticBehaviour, STBehaviour, VisionBehaviour
public abstract class AAABehaviour extends Object implements IBehaviour
Behaviour base com métodos padrão vazios
